title: Decision No. 44 of 2022 Regarding Notification and Prior Authorisation Procedures
summary: Provides the procedural channel for processing notifications and authorisation requests, including processing records that identify proposed transfers of personal data outside Bahrain.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Sets PDPA filing procedures for notification and prior authorisation.

notes: Related instruments: Law No. 30 of 2018 and Decision No. 42 of 2022
